summary: Full portfolio website testing - backend 100% pass, frontend sections all render correctly, critical bug found in contact form where EmailJS failure blocks backend API call

ui_bugs.issue: EmailJS (placeholder keys) throws error before backend API call is reached. Both calls are in the same try block - emailjs.send fails → catch fires → backend API /api/contact is NEVER called. Form shows error and contact is NOT saved.
Section not found by selector 'tech-stack' - may have different id/testid. Needs investigation but section may still exist with different identifier.

integration_issues.issue: Backend API POST /api/contact is never called when EmailJS fails. Fix: move backend API call before EmailJS or in separate try/catch so it always executes.

issues: Design is beautiful and consistent - cream background, dusty pink accents, polaroid photos, handwritten fonts all working well

action_items: Fix ContactSection.js: backend API call should be in its own try/catch or called before emailjs.send. The backend API should ALWAYS be called regardless of EmailJS success/failure. Suggested fix: wrap emailjs.send in its own try/catch (silently fail), then always call backend API.
Verify TechStack section has proper data-testid='tech-stack-section' attribute
critical_code_review_comments: ContactSection.js line 24-53: Critical ordering bug - emailjs.send() and fetch() are in the same try block. EmailJS with placeholder keys throws error, catch() fires, backend API never reached. Fix: separate into two try/catch blocks.
server.py: CORS middleware added AFTER router inclusion - should be added before, but works in FastAPI

success_rate.frontend: 85% - all sections render, hero/nav/mobile all working, contact form integration broken

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test contacts via direct API calls during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs work perfectly. All 12 frontend sections render. Hero section beautiful with polaroid, sticky notes, sticker badges, social links. Mobile view works with no horizontal overflow. Main bug: ContactSection.js - EmailJS failure prevents backend API call. Once fixed, retest contact form submission flow.
rca_of_issue: ContactSection.js handleSubmit function: emailjs.send() is awaited first inside a single try/catch. When EmailJS keys are placeholders ('your_service_id_here'), emailjs.send() throws an error. The catch block immediately runs (sets status='error'), and the subsequent fetch() to backend API is never executed. Fix: either (1) wrap emailjs in separate try/catch to silently fail, then always call backend, or (2) call backend API first, then try EmailJS.
